message:
feat(lab,cx,combinator,stream): expand DPOR replay, add fuzz harness, refine select combinator and stream exports

Lab subsystem:
- Significantly expand replay module with deterministic trace replay,
  schedule permutation, and divergence detection for reproducing
  concurrency bugs from recorded traces (replay.rs)
- Add lab fuzz harness for property-based schedule fuzzing with
  configurable mutation strategies (fuzz.rs)
- Extend DPOR explorer with deeper backtrack analysis (explorer.rs)
- Improve lab runtime instrumentation (runtime.rs)
- Update lab module exports

Context/combinator/stream:
- Simplify cx.rs by removing redundant helper methods
- Add select combinator weighted fairness mode with configurable
  priority biasing for stream selection (select.rs)
- Update combinator module exports
- Refine stream module exports and receiver_stream API

Core:
- Improve actor lifecycle state transitions (actor.rs)
- Add epoch boundary detection helpers (epoch.rs)
- Refine session teardown sequencing (session.rs)
- Improve remote connection error recovery (remote.rs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
